title: The World Reacts Before the Reverie
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Luffy, Germa 66 as News of Whole Cake Island spreads across the world and the story pivots toward the Reverie.
scene: The world learns a distorted version of the Whole Cake Island incident as royal delegations move toward the Reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: MOMOISLAND - Kamabaka Kingdom...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In an intense place...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The revolutionaries, who have lost their long-standing base at Baltimore...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: have moved the location of their leadership summit, as well as their main base of operations...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to this land.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As expected of VYour Blood- Line!! Straw hat-boy is amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I had no idea that Sanj-Boy was a prince of Germa 66!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He never mentioned it at all!! What a cheeky boy- chaburu!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On top of that, it seems that the world government has kicked Germa out because of this incident.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Hmmm. The executives sure are late...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They should almost be here by now, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sabo! Why have you been laying over there so long- chaburu?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Thank you for

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our Chief of Staff has been grinning non-stop ever since reading the news about Luffy-kun.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All that grinning has made his face stiff.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is he an Idiooot!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ring Ring Ring Ring Ring Ring Ring Ring Ring Ring Ring Ring Ring Ring

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This is Lindbergh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the matter? We've been waiting for you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sabo! We ran into a little trouble someplace nearby...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So.... would it be alright if we arrive a little bit later than scheduled?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's fine, as long as you're not in any danger.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Haha!! All the executives of the Revoll- Tionary Army are going to be gathering here...:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm so excited!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll be able to meet Morley-Sama, won't we?!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I care more about Betty- Sama!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Sabo, shall we finalise the plan for the operation before they get here...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This year's Reverie... It's finally time for us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes. It'll be our Declaration of War...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: against the celestial dragons...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: GRAND LINE - LULUSIA KINGDOM PORT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: help!! Someone, help meeee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: KGAAA AAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Haul in all the valuables!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where are the Marines!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PinkBARD Pirates Captain - Pinkbeard Bounty:@ 52 Million

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MOMOHA- Haha!! Are you talking about those "Fill-in" Marines?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your King and the Kingdom's strongest forces have left for the reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: under the flag of the emperor blackbeard, I have been bestowed the name of PINKBEARD!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Remember my name!! Cover in fear at the name of Black- Beard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Please, stop!! This is a poor town!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kill any- body who resists!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: UWAAA AAH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please, spare me!! The only thing of value in this town...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...15 The CELESTIAL GOD that we offer to the king and the celestial dragons!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The entire town is barely able to make ends meet, but...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We still have to give them the CELESTIAL GOLD, or we'll be killed.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh my!! You have such a terrible king!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but more importantly... there's celestial gold in this town?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Search the Town!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kyaha Kya!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Go, Morley!

summary: This section advances the Reverie Setup storyline with 52 dialogue beats. The aftermath becomes world news and the narrative shifts toward the Reverie and global politics.
